history.title: Carsat Alsace-Moselle, Strasbourg
history.body:
<0>Web and software development: Middleware Developer initially in the enterprise service bus team, developing orchestration services under WebMethods. I quickly contributed to other new projects and technical debt reduction projects as a designer-developer or project lead.
I was able to implement various REST APIs, design a data model following the company's project lifecycle, and migrate applications (GWT Front to Angular, JDK8 to JDK11, JDK17 then JDK21, etc.).

history.title: Carsat Alsace-Moselle, Strasbourg
history.body: <0>Final year project</0>: Creation of a unique resource repository project. Its objective is to locate employees and other material resources in the headquarters and agency offices, in order to help the company save operating costs.

history.title: CNAM Grand Est Engineering School, Strasbourg
history.body: Computer Science specialty - Information Systems (ISI), 5th year. This evening course training consists of various teaching units and the engineering degree is validated by a 6-month IT project in a company.

history.title: Carsat Alsace-Moselle, Strasbourg
history.body: <0>IT field technician</0>: IT equipment fleet management (1300 desktop and laptop PCs, 500 printers) across more than twenty geographical sites for approximately 1000 users within a team of 3 technicians. Level 1 and 2 incident resolution. User training on new tools.

history.title: FM Logistic, Phalsbourg
history.body: <0>Level 1 customer support technician</0>: Providing daily support to users and IT staff across the group, covering various technical areas (rights management, system incidents, network and business applications). Coordinating and assigning requests to the relevant teams when needed.

history.title: Orsay GmbH, Willstätt-Sand
history.body:
During my professional degree, I participated in a network infrastructure redesign project for 250 stores across Germany, Switzerland and Austria (homogeneity and scalability of the network infrastructure despite local differences) and coordination (external partners and internal teams).
In parallel, I maintained the IT equipment and participated in the renewal of 130 laptops within the operational production department.

history.title: LP SIL ARS, Strasbourg
history.body: Professional Degree in Computer and Software Systems, Network and Services Administration option

history.title: Orsay GmbH, Willstätt-Sand
history.body: <0>End of first year BTS internship</0>: First, I created a Windows 7 disk image for cash registers to test the compatibility of existing tools (under Windows XP) in preparation for a future deployment. Then, I studied and compared temporary solutions for out-of-service cash registers, evaluating their feasibility and viability in a business context.

history.title: BTS IRIS, Haguenau
history.body: Higher National Certificate in IT and Networks for Industry and Technical Services

history.title: Economics and Management Degree (Not graduated), Strasbourg
Scientific Baccalaureate, Bischwiller
history.body: Scientific Baccalaureate, specialty Life and Earth Sciences (S.V.T), Physics-Chemistry option

1.title: <0>Web CV</0>, 2026 - 1 month
1.body: Creation of a web CV with React. This is a personal project aimed at learning React. Production deployment is done through GitHub Actions, on a domain name registered with OVH.
